title: The Architect
setting: Crystal observatory (deep substrate) → governance hall → Spire terrace

system_imports.21d_canonical_state: 6 tongue positions + 6 phase states + 9 telemetry channels. Izack holds all 21 dimensions. Marcus perceives the full state for the first time.
system_imports.seventh_silence: Not a new tongue. The relationship between all six — the rests between notes, the gaps between tongues, the space where endings live. Already existed unconsciously in every Protocol heartbeat. Marcus makes it governed.
system_imports.keys_revealed: The keys are the ordered relationships between tongues. The seventh silence completes the lock by governing the gaps the Dominion wanted to exploit. You cannot steal a relationship between people who choose to remember together.

scenes.summary: Izack smells like honeyed mint and exhaustion. Voice of a man who stayed up too late. Polly lands on the chair arm groove.
Polly confronts Izack about the tea. 'You didn't look up.' Izack apologizes. Hairline crack in Polly's composure.
Izack reads Marcus completely. Reveals the back door — emergency recruitment pathway, 40-year-old edge case. 'I expected it to fire roughly never.'
Senna appears. 'You look like your mother.' 'I look like someone who carries too much.' 'Yes. Like your mother.'
Izack explains the gap. Six tongues govern continuation. Nothing governs endings. The seventh silence is the function in the gaps. It was always there — just ungoverned.
Marcus perceives the full 21D canonical state. Izack has been holding all 21 dimensions manually for decades.
Izack asks Marcus to bring Kael home. Not a command — a father's voice. 'Tell him I never stopped holding it.'
Marcus ascends with the seventh silence in his perception. Sits in the witness chair. Acknowledges the gap. The system hears itself. Kael's cascade loses its exploit surface.
Marcus and Polly on the terrace. 'You still owe me for the coffee.' Full circle to ch01. Book 1 complete.

backward.ch01: Stale coffee callback. 0.3-second pulse callback. 'Fell through the floor of what was real.' Protocol handshake = Izack's back door.
backward.ch02: Virtual memory / differently addressed space. Polly's corridor. First mention of the Architect.
backward.ch03: Essence brew, training hall, 'parenthood not architecture' thought recurs on terrace
backward.ch05: Sera Voss's empty verification chain — the specific dead who is acknowledged
backward.ch09: Gallery portrait — 'tired eyes, too-late dinner' — paid off in person
backward.ch20: Bonecasters holding death with skulls because system gave them nothing better
backward.ch23: Voss's stolen warrant motivated by sister's unacknowledged death
backward.ch25: Ordered witness, council vote, Alexander's 'both sons' request

forward.book2: Bring Kael home. Implement seventh silence fully. Face Dominion directly. Izack can rest.
